title: eriogonum cernuum subsp. tenue
intro: Eriogonum cernuum subsp. tenue, also known as the narrow buckwheat or slender buckwheat, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buckwheat family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as a natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent, which can help protect the body from oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, wounds, and skin conditions, thanks to its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Eriogonum cernuum subsp. tenue can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine in various forms.
